title: polygala neurocarpa
intro: Polygala neurocarpa, also known as the Mountain Violet or Common Polygala, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Polygalaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Polygala neurocarpa include its potential to aid in relieving bronchitis symptoms, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Polygala neurocarpa can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote respiratory health and overall well-being.
